name: PairReviewGate Reviewer
description: Reviewer half of the 2-of-2 PairReviewGate. Receives ONLY the structured EIP-712 AgentRequest — no Proposer rationale, no transcript. Two-layer approval: deterministic policy gate (target allowlist, value cap, selector allowlist) THEN an LLM safety check on a different provider than the Proposer. Refusal posts a Validation Registry entry with reasonCode and the gate's pair-nonce advances so the same request cannot be re-submitted as approved.

policy.evaluator: deterministic policy gate first; LLM only sees requests that already pass policy
